weeks.goal_text: Finish Arrays revision block and solve 6 mixed array problems.
Prepare resume base and shortlist 20 target companies for opening wave.
Update project README drafts and deployment notes for the top 2 projects.
Complete first AWS SAA module block and take one practice quiz.
Focus on Binary Search and Sliding Window patterns with timed practice.
Run one mock interview and review weak CS fundamentals topics.
Send referral asks and submit applications to the first 10 priority companies.
Polish one flagship project and prepare a demo video script.
Enter Trees and Graphs revision block with focus on BFS, DFS, and recursion.
Take one OA-style timed practice set and log topic misses.
Track peak-season openings daily and update application statuses promptly.
Push Dynamic Programming practice and revise 2 older hard problems.
Hold certification momentum and finish the next AWS module checkpoint.
Complete one behavioral mock and tighten stories for top companies.
Follow up on open processes and prepare interview round notes.
Run a mixed revision week across all weak topics flagged in the last month.
Keep one project ready for resume spotlight and one as backup.
Do one full technical mock and one OA logging session.
Close out peak-season applications and capture learnings in the weekly review.
Stabilize revision routine and prepare for late-season follow-ups and offers.
